prompt: A 90 mm tall short bench-test storage auger for a powder doser, with no external gear. All dimensions in millimetres. The part is a vertical hollow tube with a 25 mm outer diameter (12.5 mm outer radius) and a 21 mm inner bore diameter (10.5 mm bore radius, 2 mm wall). The bottom 12 mm is a closed funnel cone: the bore tapers from the 10.5 mm bore radius down to a 1.5 mm radius, ending in a 3 mm diameter exit hole through the very bottom face. The top is closed by a 6 mm thick cap pierced by four 4 mm by 7 mm rectangular loading slots arranged in a cross on a 6.5 mm radius, and a central 2.5 mm diameter pilot hole on the axis. Inside the bottom third of the tube there is a single-flight Archimedean screw on a central 8 mm diameter shaft. The shaft tapers from 0.8 mm diameter at the exit up to 8 mm diameter over the bottom 12 mm, then stays 8 mm. A 2 mm thick helical fin with a 10 mm pitch winds around the shaft, with an outer fin radius of 10.5 mm so it nearly touches the bore wall. The screw and fin occupy only the bottom one third of the tube height; the top two thirds of the bore is left completely open as a loose-powder storage volume.
code:
/*
Generated by Text-to-CAD:
A 90 mm tall short bench-test storage auger for a powder doser, with no external gear. All dimensions in millimetres. The part is a vertical hollow tube with a 25 mm outer diameter (12.5 mm outer radius) and a 21 mm inner bore diameter (10.5 mm bore radius, 2 mm wall). The bottom 12 mm is a closed funnel cone: the bore tapers from the 10.5 mm bore radius down to a 1.5 mm radius, ending in a 3 mm diameter exit hole through the very bottom face. The top is closed by a 6 mm thick cap pierced by four 4 mm by 7 mm rectangular loading slots arranged in a cross on a 6.5 mm radius, and a central 2.5 mm diameter pilot hole on the axis. Inside the bottom third of the tube there is a single-flight Archimedean screw on a central 8 mm diameter shaft. The shaft tapers from 0.8 mm diameter at the exit up to 8 mm diameter over the bottom 12 mm, then stays 8 mm. A 2 mm thick helical fin with a 10 mm pitch winds around the shaft, with an outer fin radius of 10.5 mm so it nearly touches the bore wall. The screw and fin occupy only the bottom one third of the tube height; the top two thirds of the bore is left completely open as a loose-powder storage volume. 
*/
@settings(defaultLengthUnit = mm)

// Primary dimensions
tubeHeight = 90mm
outerRadius = 12.5mm
boreRadius = 10.5mm
wallThickness = 2mm
funnelHeight = 12mm
exitRadius = 1.5mm
capThickness = 6mm
capStartZ = tubeHeight - capThickness

slotWidth = 4mm
slotLength = 7mm
slotCenterRadius = 6.5mm
pilotDiameter = 2.5mm
pilotRadius = pilotDiameter / 2

screwHeight = tubeHeight / 3
shaftRadius = 4mm
shaftExitRadius = 0.4mm
shaftTaperHeight = funnelHeight
finThickness = 2mm
finOuterRadius = boreRadius
finInnerRadius = shaftRadius - 0.1mm
screwPitch = 10mm
flightPathLength = screwHeight - funnelHeight - finThickness
flightMidRadius = (finInnerRadius + finOuterRadius) / 2
flightStartZ = funnelHeight + finThickness / 2
slotCutStartZ = capStartZ - 1mm
slotCutLength = capThickness + 2mm

// Revolved tube material: OD wall, conical funnel, and top cap.
tubeProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  bottomEdge = line(start = [var 1.5mm, var 0mm], end = [var 12.5mm, var 0mm])
  outerWall = line(start = [var 12.5mm, var 0mm], end = [var 12.5mm, var 90mm])
  topFace = line(start = [var 12.5mm, var 90mm], end = [var 0mm, var 90mm])
  capAxis = line(start = [var 0mm, var 90mm], end = [var 0mm, var 84mm])
  capUnderside = line(start = [var 0mm, var 84mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 84mm])
  boreWall = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 84mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 12mm])
  funnelWall = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 12mm], end = [var 1.5mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([bottomEdge.end, outerWall.start])
  coincident([outerWall.end, topFace.start])
  coincident([topFace.end, capAxis.start])
  coincident([capAxis.end, capUnderside.start])
  coincident([capUnderside.end, boreWall.start])
  coincident([boreWall.end, funnelWall.start])
  coincident([funnelWall.end, bottomEdge.start])

  horizontal(bottomEdge)
  vertical(outerWall)
  horizontal(topFace)
  vertical(capAxis)
  horizontal(capUnderside)
  vertical(boreWall)

  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, bottomEdge.start]) == exitRadius
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, bottomEdge.start]) == 0mm
  horizontalDistance([bottomEdge.start, bottomEdge.end]) == outerRadius - exitRadius
  verticalDistance([outerWall.start, outerWall.end]) == tubeHeight
  horizontalDistance([topFace.end, topFace.start]) == outerRadius
  verticalDistance([capAxis.end, capAxis.start]) == capThickness
  horizontalDistance([capUnderside.start, capUnderside.end]) == boreRadius
  verticalDistance([boreWall.end, boreWall.start]) == tubeHeight - capThickness - funnelHeight
}
tubeRegion = region(point = [11.5mm, 50mm], sketch = tubeProfile)
tubeBlank = revolve(tubeRegion, axis = Y)
hide(tubeProfile)

// One radial loading-slot cutter, circular-patterned into a cross.
slotSketch = sketch(on = offsetPlane(XY, offset = slotCutStartZ)) {
  slotBottom = line(start = [var 3mm, var -2mm], end = [var 10mm, var -2mm])
  slotOuterSide = line(start = [var 10mm, var -2mm], end = [var 10mm, var 2mm])
  slotTop = line(start = [var 10mm, var 2mm], end = [var 3mm, var 2mm])
  slotInnerSide = line(start = [var 3mm, var 2mm], end = [var 3mm, var -2mm])

  coincident([slotBottom.end, slotOuterSide.start])
  coincident([slotOuterSide.end, slotTop.start])
  coincident([slotTop.end, slotInnerSide.start])
  coincident([slotInnerSide.end, slotBottom.start])

  horizontal(slotBottom)
  vertical(slotOuterSide)
  horizontal(slotTop)
  vertical(slotInnerSide)

  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, slotBottom.start]) == slotCenterRadius - (slotLength / 2)
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, slotBottom.start]) == -slotWidth / 2
  horizontalDistance([slotBottom.start, slotBottom.end]) == slotLength
  verticalDistance([slotOuterSide.start, slotOuterSide.end]) == slotWidth
}
slotRegion = region(point = [6.5mm, 0mm], sketch = slotSketch)
slotCutterBase = extrude(slotRegion, length = slotCutLength)
slotCutters = patternCircular3d(
  slotCutterBase,
  instances = 4,
  axis = Z,
  center = [0mm, 0mm, 0mm],
  arcDegrees = 360deg,
  rotateDuplicates = true,
)
hide(slotSketch)

pilotSketch = sketch(on = offsetPlane(XY, offset = slotCutStartZ)) {
  pilotCircle = circle(start = [var 1.25mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  coincident([pilotCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  horizontal([pilotCircle.center, pilotCircle.start])
  diameter(pilotCircle) == pilotDiameter
}
pilotRegion = region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = pilotSketch)
pilotCutter = extrude(pilotRegion, length = slotCutLength)
hide(pilotSketch)

tubeWithSlots = subtract([tubeBlank], tools = slotCutters)
tubeBody = subtract(tubeWithSlots, tools = [pilotCutter])
  |> appearance(
       color = "#7aa4c7",
       metalness = 10,
       roughness = 60,
       opacity = 55,
     )

// Shaft tapers through the funnel, then remains 8 mm diameter to z=30 mm.
shaftProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  axisLine = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 0mm, var 30mm])
  topRadiusLine = line(start = [var 0mm, var 30mm], end = [var 4mm, var 30mm])
  straightShaft = line(start = [var 4mm, var 30mm], end = [var 4mm, var 12mm])
  taperShaft = line(start = [var 4mm, var 12mm], end = [var 0.4mm, var 0mm])
  exitRadiusLine = line(start = [var 0.4mm, var 0mm], end = [var 0mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([axisLine.end, topRadiusLine.start])
  coincident([topRadiusLine.end, straightShaft.start])
  coincident([straightShaft.end, taperShaft.start])
  coincident([taperShaft.end, exitRadiusLine.start])
  coincident([exitRadiusLine.end, axisLine.start])

  vertical(axisLine)
  horizontal(topRadiusLine)
  vertical(straightShaft)
  horizontal(exitRadiusLine)

  coincident([axisLine.start, ORIGIN])
  verticalDistance([axisLine.start, axisLine.end]) == screwHeight
  horizontalDistance([topRadiusLine.start, topRadiusLine.end]) == shaftRadius
  verticalDistance([straightShaft.end, straightShaft.start]) == screwHeight - shaftTaperHeight
  horizontalDistance([axisLine.start, exitRadiusLine.start]) == shaftExitRadius
}
shaftRegion = region(point = [2mm, 20mm], sketch = shaftProfile)
shaftBody = revolve(shaftRegion, axis = Y)
  |> appearance(color = "#c46f2b", metalness = 35, roughness = 45)
hide(shaftProfile)

// Flight is kept in the cylindrical bore above the funnel to avoid cone interference.
flightAxisSketch = sketch(on = XZ) {
  flightAxis = line(start = [var 0mm, var 13mm], end = [var 0mm, var 29mm])
  vertical(flightAxis)
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, flightAxis.start]) == 0mm
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, flightAxis.start]) == flightStartZ
  verticalDistance([flightAxis.start, flightAxis.end]) == flightPathLength
}
flightHelix = helix(
  revolutions = flightPathLength / screwPitch,
  angleStart = 0deg,
  ccw = true,
  radius = flightMidRadius,
  axis = flightAxisSketch.flightAxis,
  length = flightPathLength,
)
hide(flightAxisSketch)

flightProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  flightBottom = line(start = [var 3.9mm, var 12mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 12mm])
  flightOuter = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 12mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 14mm])
  flightTop = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 14mm], end = [var 3.9mm, var 14mm])
  flightInner = line(start = [var 3.9mm, var 14mm], end = [var 3.9mm, var 12mm])

  coincident([flightBottom.end, flightOuter.start])
  coincident([flightOuter.end, flightTop.start])
  coincident([flightTop.end, flightInner.start])
  coincident([flightInner.end, flightBottom.start])

  horizontal(flightBottom)
  vertical(flightOuter)
  horizontal(flightTop)
  vertical(flightInner)

  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, flightBottom.start]) == finInnerRadius
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, flightBottom.start]) == funnelHeight
  horizontalDistance([flightBottom.start, flightBottom.end]) == finOuterRadius - finInnerRadius
  verticalDistance([flightOuter.start, flightOuter.end]) == finThickness
}
flightRegion = region(point = [7.2mm, 13mm], sketch = flightProfile)
flightBody = sweep(flightRegion, path = flightHelix)
  |> appearance(color = "#e09a3d", metalness = 30, roughness = 45)
hide(flightProfile)
hide(flightHelix)
